title: Maintain the laboratory/field workplace fit for purpose
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain the laboratory/field workplace fit for purpose demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Clean work preparation areas

pcs.text: Clean preparation areas using appropriate cleaning agents and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean preparation areas using appropriate cleaning agents and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean preparation areas using appropriate cleaning agents and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Remove spillages using appropriate agents, personal protective equipment (PPE) and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove spillages using appropriate agents, personal protective equipment (PPE) and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove spillages using appropriate agents, personal protective equipment (PPE) and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Collect and segregate wastes in accordance with workplace procedures, relevant codes and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and segregate wastes in accordance with workplace procedures, relevant codes and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and segregate wastes in accordance with workplace procedures, relevant codes and regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Clean work preparation areas

elements.title: Clean and store equipment

pcs.text: Collect used equipment, inspect for faults and, where necessary, remove from service
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect used equipment, inspect for faults and, where necessary, remove from service?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect used equipment, inspect for faults and, where necessary, remove from service.

pcs.text: Use appropriate agents, apparatus and techniques to clean equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate agents, apparatus and techniques to clean equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate agents, apparatus and techniques to clean equipment.

pcs.text: Store clean equipment in the designated locations and manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store clean equipment in the designated locations and manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store clean equipment in the designated locations and manner.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Clean and store equipment

elements.title: Monitor stocks of materials and equipment

pcs.text: Perform stock checks and maintain records of usage as directed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform stock checks and maintain records of usage as directed.

pcs.text: Store labelled stocks for safe and efficient retrieval

pcs.text: Inform appropriate personnel of impending stock shortages to maintain continuity of supply

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform appropriate personnel of impending stock shortages to maintain continuity of supply.
